question: The line chart shows annual sales from 1924 to 2024. Which statement best describes the main difficulty in drawing precise conclusions from this chart?

options.A: The chart is so small that it is hard to read exact values and subtle changes in the sales trend.
options.B: Sales increased at a perfectly steady rate every year from 1924 to 2024.
options.C: Sales stayed exactly the same from 1924 to 2024.
options.D: Sales clearly declined throughout the entire period shown.

explanation: The chart shows sales rising to a peak around 1975 and then declining. Small visual elements can lead to misreading the trend as a steady increase.
